description: Upload an encrypted group metadata blob

main.description: Upload an encrypted group metadata blob to the server. The blobLocator (UUIDv4) is client-generated and serves as the idempotency key.

schema.description: The encrypted blob data (nonce || ciphertext || tag)

size.description: Size of the stored blob in bytes

errors.name: BlobTooLarge
errors.description: The blob exceeds the maximum allowed size

errors.name: NotMember
errors.description: Caller is not a member of the specified group
